_comment: Generated by scripts/skills-to-json.ts — DO NOT edit by hand. Applied by sync-skills.ts, which inserts by name only (never updates), so an operator-edited schedule survives a sync.

automations.name: Invoice Reconciliation
automations.description: Daily check for sent invoices without matching journal entries. FlowPilot reviews and books them autonomously using the correct accounting template.

automations.name: consultant_reindex_stale
automations.description: Background job that embeds consultant profiles flagged as stale so semantic search stays fresh.

automations.name: Contract Renewal Alert
automations.description: Every weekday at 08:00, FlowPilot checks for contracts expiring within 30 days and alerts the admin.

automations.name: Contract Billing
automations.description: Every day at 06:30, invoice active contracts whose billing date has arrived.

automations.name: inbound_email_to_ticket
automations.description: On every email.received event (from composio-webhook), convert the email into a ticket or append it to an existing thread.

automations.name: Monthly Expense Processing
automations.description: On the 1st of each month, FlowPilot reviews all draft expenses from the previous month, submits reports per employee, and prompts admin for approval.

automations.name: invoice_completed_service_orders
automations.description: When a service order is marked completed, draft an invoice from its line items so the customer can be billed quickly.

automations.name: fixed-assets-monthly-depreciation
automations.description: Post monthly depreciation across all active fixed assets on the 1st of each month at 03:00 UTC.

automations.name: Weekly Business Digest
automations.description: Every Friday afternoon, summarise traffic, leads, and top content, then log to activity.

automations.name: HR Leave Review Reminder
automations.description: Every weekday at 09:00, FlowPilot checks for pending leave requests and reminds admin to review them.

automations.name: Nightly MRP run
automations.description: Runs the procurement scheduler every night to generate fresh PO/MO suggestions for products below their reorder point.

automations.name: Auto-allocate picking on order paid
automations.description: When an order moves to paid, automatically create a pick-list and reserve stock so the warehouse can start picking immediately.

automations.name: Invoice Overdue Check
automations.description: Every day at 08:00, FlowPilot checks for invoices past their due date and flags them as overdue.

automations.name: Month-End Billing Run
automations.description: On the 1st of every month at 05:00 the previous month is billed as one step: timesheet invoice drafts per project + lapsed subscription renewals. Drafts only — sending stays behind approval.

automations.name: Nightly preventive maintenance sweep
automations.description: Materialize due preventive schedules into maintenance requests every night.

automations.name: MRP shortage → procurement
automations.description: When an MO reports component shortages, automatically trigger procurement requests so the agent can create draft POs.

automations.name: fetch-fx-rates-daily
automations.description: Pull ECB daily reference rates each morning at 06:15 UTC.

automations.name: Social Post Scheduler
automations.description: Every 15 minutes, process scheduled social posts whose publish time has passed.

automations.name: Auto Reorder Check
automations.description: Daily check for products below reorder threshold. FlowPilot reviews stock levels and creates draft POs for approval.

automations.name: Auto-match vendor invoice on registration
automations.description: When a vendor invoice is registered, immediately run 3-way matching against PO + goods receipts.

automations.name: Recurring Quotes
automations.description: Every day at 06:00, generate the next quote for every recurring-quote schedule that is due.

automations.name: Daily Bookkeeping Sweep
automations.description: Every weekday at 06:30 the whole bank-event pipeline runs as one step: rules → match → propose → auto-book (≥95 confidence). Non-auto proposals land in the review queue.

automations.name: Recruitment Daily Pipeline Review
automations.description: Every weekday at 08:30, FlowPilot summarizes the candidate pipeline and flags stuck or top-scored candidates needing attention.

automations.name: Trial Conversion
automations.description: Every day at 05:00, convert trial subscriptions whose trial period has ended into active subscriptions.

automations.name: Subscription Billing
automations.description: Every day at 05:30, invoice manual subscriptions whose next invoice date has arrived (trials are converted first).

automations.name: Weekly Timesheet Reminder
automations.description: Every Friday at 15:00, FlowPilot checks if employees have logged at least 35 hours for the week and reminds those who haven't.

automations.name: Project Budget Alert
automations.description: Every Monday at 09:00, FlowPilot checks all active projects with budget_hours and alerts if any project has exceeded 90% of its budget.

automations.name: Score visitor intent (every 15 min)
automations.description: Evaluates visitor-intelligence rules against recent page views and fires behavioral signals against identified leads. Adjust cadence or pause here without touching the database.
